title: Omega-Chips
description: It just adds coins that you can exchange for other coins to act as a server economy
body:
|![OMEGA-Chips](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/edonoo6R/images/eb279ca613d8b16447af0cd767a05c9e4a100e97.png)|
|:-:|
|[![PATREON](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/5734cca1afdce0361bf51525d192d857e4ee5255.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Crumbslord)     [![TWITTER](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/3258940f91415129514d21e643c3ecbed11f54aa.png)](https://twitter.com/CrumbsLord)    [![CURSEFORGE](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/534277007517bb3af8a2cdd14b49d1fe3d67e2ee.png)](https://curseforge.com/members/lord_of_crumbs)     [![MODRINTH](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/d6ef08c353be7e06bf25284aadf17f296f81e85e.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Lord_Of_Crumbs)|

![INFO](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/edonoo6R/images/74d6feaf4f8348eb7effa06d0805e12eefdeee92.png)

 
It adds coins that you can exchange for other coins to act as a server economy.

 

These coins aren't used for anything by themself, you'll have to be the one to make them useful. 

You can use them as a currency in a modpack, or in an SMP/server.


![---](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/edonoo6R/images/f167a55924018b47ee5b799352b7dad1c4465256.png)


Exchange Rates:

- 9 copper to 1 iron
- 9 iron to 1 gold
- 9 gold to 1 diamond
- and vice versa

- 4 coins to 1 block
- 1 block to 4 coins
- blocks can also be exchanged in a grid like coins
